source: Aggregated from public deal sites (Doctor of Credit, AwardWallet, Upgraded Points, Frequent Miler)

offers.description: Earn 15% cash back when you spend $100 or more on Renaissance Hotels stays, up to $75 cash back. Targeted offer on select Chase cards.
offers.terms: Direct payment with merchant. One-time use. No BNPL transactions. Enrollment required.

offers.description: Earn 15% cash back when you spend $450 or more at Park Hyatt hotels, up to $70 cash back. Targeted offer.
offers.terms: No third-party purchases or BNPL. One-time use. Enrollment required.

offers.description: Earn 10% cash back when you spend $100 or more at Le Meridien Hotels & Resorts, up to $57 cash back. Targeted Marriott brand offer.
offers.terms: Direct payment. No BNPL. One-time use. Enrollment required.

offers.description: Earn 15% cash back when you spend $100 or more at TownePlace Suites by Marriott, up to $57 cash back.
offers.terms: One-time use. Direct payment. Enrollment required.

offers.description: Earn 10% cash back when you spend $100 or more at select Best Western properties, up to $32 cash back.
offers.terms: Select properties only. One-time use. Direct payment. Enrollment required.

offers.description: Earn 15% cash back when you spend $375 or more at Hyatt Unbound Collection properties, up to $60 cash back.
offers.terms: Excludes specific properties. One-time use. Enrollment required.

offers.description: Earn 5% cash back when you spend $100 or more at Hyatt Place, Hyatt House, or Hyatt Studios, up to $20 cash back.
offers.terms: U.S. in-store and online only. One-time use. Enrollment required.

offers.description: Earn 10% cash back when you spend $100 or more at Gaylord Palms Resort, up to $42 cash back.
offers.terms: One-time use. Direct payment required. Enrollment required.

offers.description: Earn 10% cash back when you spend $100 or more at Postcard Cabins (formerly Getaway), up to $60 cash back. U.S. locations only.
offers.terms: Direct payment, U.S. only. One-time use. Enrollment required.

offers.description: Earn 10% cash back when you spend $500 or more at select Caesars Rewards properties in Las Vegas, Reno, Lake Tahoe, and Atlantic City, up to $50 cash back.
offers.terms: Select properties in Las Vegas, Reno, Lake Tahoe, Atlantic City. One-time use. Enrollment required.

offers.description: Earn 10% cash back when you spend $100 or more on Air India flights, up to $50 cash back. Direct airline purchases only.
offers.terms: Direct merchant purchases only. One-time use. Enrollment required.

offers.description: Earn 10% cash back on Lyft rides when you spend $100 or more, up to $10 back. Some cards may see a 5% variant.
offers.terms: One-time use. Some cards offer 5% variant. Enrollment required.

offers.description: Get 15% cash back when you spend $15 or more on Airalo eSIM data plans for international travel, up to $25 back.
offers.terms: One-time use. Direct merchant purchases only. Some cards offer 10% or 5%. Enrollment required.

offers.description: Earn $30 cash back when you book a Turo car rental of $150 or more through turo.com or the Turo app.
offers.terms: Turo app or Turo.com only. One-time offer. No gift cards. Enrollment required.

offers.description: Earn $100 cash back when you spend $600 or more on Chase Travel hotel, airfare, car rental, or tour bookings in a single transaction.
offers.terms: Targeted offer. Single transaction on Chase Travel portal. Enrollment required.

offers.description: Earn 30% cash back on a Sam's Club membership purchase. Great value when combined with a new or renewal membership.
offers.terms: Membership purchase only. One-time offer. Enrollment required.

offers.description: Earn 10% cash back at Starbucks, up to $3 back. Some cards may see 5% or 15% variants. Works in-store and in the Starbucks app.
offers.terms: In-store and Starbucks app. Targeted offer — value may vary. Enrollment required.

offers.description: Q1 2026 bonus category: Earn 5% cash back on dining (restaurants, fast food, delivery apps), Norwegian Cruise Line, and American Heart Association donations. Freedom Flex earns up to 7x total on dining.
offers.terms: Freedom Flex and Freedom cards only. Must activate by 3/14/2026. Up to $1,500 in combined purchases. Includes DoorDash, UberEats.

offers.description: Q2 2026 bonus category (Apr–Jun): Earn 5% cash back at Amazon, Whole Foods Market, Chase Travel, and on donations to Feeding America. Activation is now open.
offers.terms: Freedom Flex and Freedom cards only. Activate by 6/14/2026. Up to $1,500 in combined purchases. Includes Amazon Prime renewal.

offers.description: Q1 2026 spending bonus on co-branded Chase cards: Earn 5x points at grocery stores, gas stations, and restaurants. Available on Southwest, United, BA, Aer Lingus, Marriott, and IHG cards.
offers.terms: Jan 15 – Mar 31, 2026. Up to $1,000 in eligible spend. Available on select co-branded cards. Must register.

offers.description: Sapphire Reserve cardholders get up to $250 in statement credits on prepaid Chase Travel hotel bookings of 2+ nights at IHG, Montage, Pendry, Omni, Virgin Hotels, and more through 2026.
offers.terms: Sapphire Reserve / Reserve for Business only. 2026 benefit. Prepaid Chase Travel hotel bookings. 2+ night stays at partner hotels.

offers.description: Sapphire Reserve cardholders get 100% cash back on a 1-year Calm Premium subscription when you spend $34.99 or more at calm.com.
offers.terms: Sapphire Reserve cardholders only. Online at calm.com. One-time offer. Enrollment required.

offers.description: Sapphire Reserve and Sapphire Preferred cardholders can earn $500 back on a full-body Prenuvo MRI scan. A unique wellness benefit through Chase Sapphire.
offers.terms: Sapphire Preferred and Sapphire Reserve cardholders. One-time offer. Enrollment required.

offers.description: Transfer Chase Ultimate Rewards points to Aer Lingus AerClub at a 20% bonus rate — get 1,200 Avios for every 1,000 UR points transferred.
offers.terms: Transfer from Chase UR to Aer Lingus AerClub. 20% bonus through 3/31/2026. Allow 1-2 business days.

offers.description: Transfer Chase Ultimate Rewards points to Wyndham Rewards at a 30% bonus rate — get 1,300 Wyndham points for every 1,000 UR points transferred.
offers.terms: Transfer from Chase UR to Wyndham Rewards. 30% bonus through 3/31/2026. Allow 1-2 business days.

offers.description: Earn 5% cash back on United Airlines flight purchases made directly with United.
offers.terms: Direct United.com purchases only. Enrollment required.
